notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: 2026年“双百”活动中央和国家机关专场报告会在京举行
articles.highlight: 2026年“百名法学家百场报告会”法治宣讲活动中央和国家机关专场报告会在京举行，主题为贯彻实施生态环境法典。
articles.summary: 该报告会聚焦生态环境法典的贯彻实施，体现了国家推动法治建设的决心。活动由中央和国家机关联合举办，具有重要政策导向意义。值得关注以了解中国法治最新动态。

articles.title: 中加举行第三次高级别国家安全与法治对话
articles.highlight: 双方就打击跨国犯罪、反恐、禁毒、移民执法合作等问题深入交换意见
articles.summary: 第三次中加高级别国家安全与法治对话在北京举行，双方就打击跨国犯罪、反恐、禁毒、移民执法合作等问题深入交换意见。该对话展示了中加两国在安全与法治领域的合作意愿，值得关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 此次对话体现了中加在执法安全领域的合作意愿，但具体成果取决于后续落实。

articles.title: 中国证监会：加强应对全球市场波动和风险跨境传导的政策储备
articles.highlight: 中国证监会提出加强应对全球市场波动和风险跨境传导的政策储备。

articles.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
articles.highlight: 布伦特原油价格周四上涨超过6%，中东战争持续升级。
articles.summary: 受中东冲突升级影响，布伦特原油价格自五月以来首次突破每桶100美元，涨幅超过6%。该事件反映了地缘政治风险对全球能源市场的直接冲击，值得关注后续走势。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：中东地缘政治紧张局势是推动油价突破100美元的主要因素，需警惕进一步升级风险。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The price of Brent crude rose more than 6% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.

en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Escalating Middle East geopolitical tensions are the primary driver pushing oil above $100; further escalation risks remain.

articles.title: Canada cancels joint bridge-opening celebration with US amid trade tensions
articles.highlight: 特朗普50%关税威胁意味着戈迪·豪国际大桥的剪彩庆祝活动将不会举行。
articles.summary: 由于特朗普宣布对大部分加拿大商品征收50%关税，原定于周五举行的美加联合大桥开通庆典被取消。该桥连接底特律和温莎，是两国重要基础设施。此举凸显贸易紧张加剧对双边象征性合作的冲击。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：贸易摩擦不仅影响经济，还波及象征性合作项目，如联合庆典。这提醒我们，即使是非核心事务也可能因政治紧张而中断。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Trump’s 50% tariff threat means there will be no ribbon-cutting celebration of Gordie Howe International Bridge A planned joint US-Canada ceremony on Friday celebrating the opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge connecting Detroit and Windsor, Ontario, is no longer expected to take place after Donald Trump announced a 50% tariff on most Canadian goods. In announcing the tariffs, the president accused Canada of unfairly discriminating against US automobiles, alcohol and dairy products, escalating tensions with one of the United States’ closest allies.

zh.title: 加拿大取消与美国联合大桥开通庆典，贸易战升级

zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：贸易摩擦不仅影响经济，还波及象征性合作项目，如联合庆典。这提醒我们，即使是非核心事务也可能因政治紧张而中断。

en.highlight: Trump’s 50% tariff threat means there will be no ribbon-cutting celebration of Gordie Howe International Bridge.
en.summary: A planned joint US-Canada ceremony for the Gordie Howe International Bridge was canceled after Trump announced 50% tariffs on Canadian goods. The bridge connects Detroit and Windsor, Ontario. The cancellation highlights how trade disputes spill over into symbolic bilateral events.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Trade tensions can disrupt even symbolic cooperative events, showing the breadth of impact beyond direct economic measures.
en.title: Canada cancels joint bridge-opening celebration with US amid trade tensions

articles.title: UditAkhourii/adhd
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目为编码智能体提供ADHD技能，基于Claude和Codex Agent SDK实现树状思维与剪枝，提升创造性及跨学科工作的效率。值得关注其如何通过并行发散与评分剪枝机制优化智能体推理过程。
articles.failureAnalysis: 依赖特定SDK（Claude和Codex）可能限制适用性；思维树与剪枝的复杂度可能导致部署成本高，实际收益未验证。用户需求集中在少部分创意任务，市场分布窄。缺乏数据支撑泛化效果，工程稳定性成疑。
articles.highlight: 树状思维结合剪枝，并行发散不同认知框架下的思路，评分并剪除陷阱，深化幸存思路。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2065 stars and recent public activity. Description: ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude & Codex Agent SDK.

zh.title: ADHD：编码智能体的思维树剪枝技能
zh.highlight: 树状思维结合剪枝，并行发散不同认知框架下的思路，评分并剪除陷阱，深化幸存思路。
zh.summary: 该项目为编码智能体提供ADHD技能，基于Claude和Codex Agent SDK实现树状思维与剪枝，提升创造性及跨学科工作的效率。值得关注其如何通过并行发散与评分剪枝机制优化智能体推理过程。
zh.failureAnalysis: 依赖特定SDK（Claude和Codex）可能限制适用性；思维树与剪枝的复杂度可能导致部署成本高，实际收益未验证。用户需求集中在少部分创意任务，市场分布窄。缺乏数据支撑泛化效果，工程稳定性成疑。

en.highlight: Tree-of-thought with pruning fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, and deepens the survivors.
en.summary: This repository provides an ADHD skill for coding agents, built on the Claude and Codex Agent SDK, using tree-of-thought and pruning to enhance creativity and interdisciplinary work. It is worth reading for its novel approach to parallel reasoning and structured pruning.
en.failureAnalysis: Dependence on specific SDKs limits portability; complexity of tree-of-thought may increase deployment cost without proven real-world benefit. Niche demand for creative tasks, insufficient validation data, and uncertain engineering robustness.
en.title: ADHD: A Tree-of-Thought Pruning Skill for Coding Agents

articles.title: Stack-Cairn/LiveAgent
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目是一个开源的AI代理桌面客户端，支持通过WebUI进行交互，并允许用户自定义扩展功能。获得1354星标和近期活跃的社区活动，表明其具有一定的实用价值和开发潜力。值得关注的是它为AI应用的本地化部署和个性化定制提供了新选择。
articles.failureAnalysis: 作为桌面客户端，普通用户安装部署门槛较高，难以与云端AI助手（如ChatGPT）的便捷性竞争。自定义扩展需要一定技术背景，限制了用户群。开源项目的商业化路径不清晰，缺乏持续维护和推广资源，可能难以获得广泛市场认可。
articles.highlight: 一个功能完整的AI代理桌面客户端，支持Web界面访问，可进行创意定制和扩展！
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1354 stars and recent public activity. Description: A fully functional AI Agent desktop client that supports Webui access and can be creatively customized and expanded!

en.highlight: A fully functional AI Agent desktop client that supports WebUI access and can be creatively customized and expanded!
en.summary: This open-source project provides a desktop client for AI agents with WebUI access and extensibility. With 1354 stars and recent activity, it offers a locally deployable alternative for AI customization. It's worth reading for those interested in self-hosted AI tools.
en.failureAnalysis: Desktop installation poses a barrier for average users compared to cloud-based AI services. The need for technical skills to customize limits its audience, and the open-source business model may hinder sustainable growth.
en.title: LiveAgent: Customizable AI Agent Desktop Client

articles.title: Synergistic Interface Stability and High Room-Temperature Ionic Conductivity for Wide-Temperature All-Solid-State Batteries Based on Li6+xSixSb1-xS5I Electrolytes
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic energy; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 全固态电池中，硫化物电解质与高压正极界面不稳定，导致空间电荷层、界面电阻增大和枝晶穿透，限制了实用化。
paperCard.method: 通过Si部分替代Sb，合成Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I电解质；使用LiNbO3包覆LiNi0.7Co0.1Mn0.2O2正极；优化VGCF导电剂含量，实现界面保护与离子传输协同。
paperCard.difference: 以往工作多单独优化电解质或包覆层，本文首次将Si掺杂、正极包覆和导电剂调控三者集成，系统解决界面问题。
paperCard.innovation: 1. Si掺杂降低锂离子迁移能垒（活化能0.18 eV）；2. LiNbO3包覆防止正极与电解质直接反应；3. 精确控制导电剂含量平衡电子传输与分解风险。
paperCard.implementation: 采用球磨+热处理合成电解质；正极材料涂覆LiNbO3后与电解质、VGCF混合形成复合正极；组装扣式电池测试电化学性能。
paperCard.applications: 适用于高能量密度、宽温域（-20°C至60°C）的全固态锂电池，如电动汽车、便携电子设备。
technicalTerms: 硫化物固态电解质：一种以硫元素为主的固体离子导体，具有高离子电导率和柔软性；
argyrodite：一类具有特定晶体结构的硫化物，化学式Li6PS5X，可掺杂改性；
空间电荷层：电极/电解质界面因锂离子浓度差异形成的电荷区域，阻碍离子传输；
LiNbO3包覆：在正极表面涂覆铌酸锂层，起到物理屏障和离子传导作用；
VGCF：气相生长碳纤维，用作导电添加剂建立电子通路。

articles.highlight: 通过Si掺杂优化Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I电解质，实现9.9 mS/cm的室温离子电导率和宽温域稳定循环。
articles.summary: 该论文通过Si掺杂锑基硫化物电解质（Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I），结合LiNbO3包覆正极和导电剂优化，实现了高离子电导率、宽温域稳定循环的全固态电池，初始容量171.2 mAh/g，200圈后容量保持84.2%。
articles.failureAnalysis: 论文主要关注实验室优化，未提及大规模制备成本和长期循环稳定性（如500圈以上）；电解质对空气敏感，实际封装要求高。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Synergistic interface stability and high room-temperature ionic conductivity for wide-temperature all-solid-state batteries based on Li6+xSixSb1−xS5I electrolytes Liang Minga, Qizhiran Sun a, Guanping Xu a, Muqing Su a, Enyan Zhaoa, Wenzhe Gua, Weng-Fu Ioa, Kwun Nam Hui a, Chuang Yub,∗, Hai-Feng Lia,∗ aInstitute of Applied Physics and Materials Engineering, University of Macau, Avenida da Universidade, Taipa, Macao S.A.R., 999078, China bSchool of Information Mechanics and Sensing Engineering, Xidian University, Xian PR, 710126, China Abstract Solid-state lithium-ion batteries (LIBs) are increasingly recognized for their exceptional en- ergy density and safety, yet their widespread adoption is challenged by persistent issues such as thermal and electrochemical instability, dendrite formation, and limited compatibility with high-voltage cathodes. Sulfide-based solid electrolytes (SEs), particularly iodide argyrodites, of- fer outstanding ionic conductivity and stability; however, practical application is constrained by the formation of space-charge layers, slow ion transport, and susceptibility to dendrite penetra- tion. To address these challenges, we synthesize a novel Li 6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I argyrodite electrolyte via ball milling and heat treatment, achieving a remarkable room-temperature ionic conduc- tivity of 9.9 mS cm −1.

zh.title: 基于Li6+xSixSb1-xS5I电解质的宽温域全固态电池：协同界面稳定性与高室温离子电导率
zh.highlight: 通过Si掺杂优化Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I电解质，实现9.9 mS/cm的室温离子电导率和宽温域稳定循环。
zh.summary: 该论文通过Si掺杂锑基硫化物电解质（Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I），结合LiNbO3包覆正极和导电剂优化，实现了高离子电导率、宽温域稳定循环的全固态电池，初始容量171.2 mAh/g，200圈后容量保持84.2%。
zh.failureAnalysis: 论文主要关注实验室优化，未提及大规模制备成本和长期循环稳定性（如500圈以上）；电解质对空气敏感，实际封装要求高。

paperCard.problem: 全固态电池中，硫化物电解质与高压正极界面不稳定，导致空间电荷层、界面电阻增大和枝晶穿透，限制了实用化。
paperCard.method: 通过Si部分替代Sb，合成Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I电解质；使用LiNbO3包覆LiNi0.7Co0.1Mn0.2O2正极；优化VGCF导电剂含量，实现界面保护与离子传输协同。
paperCard.difference: 以往工作多单独优化电解质或包覆层，本文首次将Si掺杂、正极包覆和导电剂调控三者集成，系统解决界面问题。
paperCard.innovation: 1. Si掺杂降低锂离子迁移能垒（活化能0.18 eV）；2. LiNbO3包覆防止正极与电解质直接反应；3. 精确控制导电剂含量平衡电子传输与分解风险。
paperCard.implementation: 采用球磨+热处理合成电解质；正极材料涂覆LiNbO3后与电解质、VGCF混合形成复合正极；组装扣式电池测试电化学性能。
paperCard.applications: 适用于高能量密度、宽温域（-20°C至60°C）的全固态锂电池，如电动汽车、便携电子设备。
technicalTerms: 硫化物固态电解质：一种以硫元素为主的固体离子导体，具有高离子电导率和柔软性；
argyrodite：一类具有特定晶体结构的硫化物，化学式Li6PS5X，可掺杂改性；
空间电荷层：电极/电解质界面因锂离子浓度差异形成的电荷区域，阻碍离子传输；
LiNbO3包覆：在正极表面涂覆铌酸锂层，起到物理屏障和离子传导作用；
VGCF：气相生长碳纤维，用作导电添加剂建立电子通路。

en.highlight: Si-doped Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I electrolyte achieves 9.9 mS/cm room-temperature ionic conductivity with wide-temperature stable cycling.
en.summary: This paper reports Si-doped antimony-based sulfide electrolyte (Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I) combined with LiNbO3-coated cathode and optimized conductive additive, achieving high ionic conductivity and stable wide-temperature cycling. Initial discharge capacity is 171.2 mAh/g with 84.2% capacity retention after 200 cycles at 0.5C.
en.failureAnalysis: The study focuses on lab-scale optimization; large-scale production cost and long-term stability (>500 cycles) are not addressed. The electrolyte is air-sensitive, requiring strict assembly conditions.
en.title: Synergistic Interface Stability and High Room-Temperature Ionic Conductivity for Wide-Temperature All-Solid-State Batteries Based on Li6+xSixSb1-xS5I Electrolytes

paperCard.problem: Sulfide solid electrolytes suffer from interface instability with high-voltage cathodes, causing space-charge layers, high interfacial resistance, and dendrite penetration, hindering practical all-solid-state batteries.
paperCard.method: Si substitution in Sb-based argyrodite (Li6.6Si0.6Sb0.4S5I); LiNbO3 coating on LiNi0.7Co0.1Mn0.2O2 cathode; optimization of VGCF content to balance electronic percolation and interfacial stability.
paperCard.difference: Previous work focuses on either electrolyte doping or cathode coating individually; this work integrates Si doping, cathode coating, and conductive additive optimization into one coherent design.
paperCard.innovation: 1. Si doping reduces Li-ion migration barrier (activation energy 0.18 eV); 2. LiNbO3 coating prevents direct cathode-electrolyte reaction; 3. Controlled VGCF content minimizes electrolyte decomposition while maintaining electronic pathways.
paperCard.implementation: Synthesis via ball milling and heat treatment; cathode coated with LiNbO3 and mixed with electrolyte and VGCF; assembled in coin cells for electrochemical testing.
paperCard.applications: High-energy-density all-solid-state batteries operating in wide temperature range (-20°C to 60°C) for electric vehicles and portable electronics.
technicalTerms: sulfide solid electrolyte: a solid ionic conductor based on sulfur, offering high conductivity and softness;
argyrodite: a crystal structure type for sulfides with formula Li6PS5X, dopable for property tuning;
space-charge layer: a region at the electrode/electrolyte interface with altered ion concentration, hindering transport;
LiNbO3 coating: a protective layer on cathode to prevent direct contact with sulfide electrolyte;
VGCF: vapor-grown carbon fiber used as conductive additive for electronic percolation.

articles.title: Enabling Rapid Calibration of BCI Systems that Detect Movement-Related Cortical Potentials in Children with Cerebral Palsy

paperCard.problem: 解决的问题：这篇论文试图把 brain_computer_interface 方向的研究推进到更可用的场景。

articles.highlight: 脑机接口神经反馈通过强化任务相关的皮层活动和外周感觉运动活动，可用于神经康复。
articles.summary: 该论文提出使脑机接口系统在脑瘫儿童中实现快速校准的方法，以促进临床采用。背景指出现有系统校准时间过长，限制了在儿科人群中的应用。
articles.failureAnalysis: 摘要仅介绍了背景和问题，缺少具体方法、实验结果和校准速度提升的量化数据，因此无法评估其实际效果和临床可行性。
articles.sourceExcerpt: IEEE TRANSACTIONS AND JOURNALS TEMPLATE 1 Enabling Rapid Calibration of BCI Systems that Detect Movement-Related Cortical Potentials in Children with Cerebral Palsy1 R. Saadatyar, Member, IEEE, D. Behboodi, Member, IEEE Abstract—Brain-computer interface neurofeedback (BCI-NFT) can be employed for neurorehabilitation by reinforcing task-contingent cortical activity and peripheral sensorimotor activity; however, its clinical adoption—particularly in pediatric populations—is limited by extensive session-specific calibration requirements.

en.title: Enabling Rapid Calibration of BCI Systems that Detect Movement-Related Cortical Potentials in Children with Cerebral Palsy
en.highlight: Brain-computer interface neurofeedback can be employed for neurorehabilitation by reinforcing task-contingent cortical activity and peripheral sensorimotor activity.
en.summary: This paper proposes methods to enable rapid calibration of BCI systems for children with cerebral palsy, aiming to increase clinical adoption. It notes that extensive calibration time currently limits pediatric use.
en.failureAnalysis: The abstract only provides background and problem statement without specific methods, results, or quantitative calibration speed improvements, limiting assessment of its actual impact.
